appraisal_events.evidence: Sûre qu’il reviendrait « aussi tendre et soumis », elle « prenait l’habitude de ne plus craindre de lui déplaire » et « lui refusait… les faveurs auxquelles il tenait le plus ».
appraisal_events.explanation: Odette, confident of her domination, deliberately refuses favors and does not fear irritating him, which constitutes a recurrent snub and reduces Swann’s hold.

status_effects.explanation: Odette gains affective leverage by being able to refuse, without perceived risk, what Swann desires and by counting on his submissive return.
Swann is locally weakened: his attempts at separation fail and he is depicted as dependent, without a hold on his desire.
